prompt: Display the factory default configuration
device_output:
#header device-name "ETX-2I"

# Factory Default File
configure
    port
        svi 96
            no shutdown
        exit
    exit
    flows
        classifier-profile mng_untagged match-any
            match untagged
        exit
        classifier-profile mng_all match-any
            match all
        exit
        flow mng_access_default_in
            classifier mng_untagged
            no policer
            ingress-port ethernet 0/101
            egress-port svi 96
            no shutdown
        exit
        flow mng_access_default_out
            classifier mng_all
            no pol
